title: Fix class parameters of enum types
body: Currently on master, if we have a class instance parameterized with enum type and a class instance parameterized with the type of the fields of that enum, these both instances will be of the same type after parameter instantiation. If the instance parameterized with the enum is processed first, the parameter will point to enum type. It will throw error about implicit conversion if non-enum value is passed to the method that expects an argument of type of the parameter.
